# Freedom First Global

> Freedom First Global is a private-sector energy company that brings field-proven, American-grade engineering and execution expertise directly to critical energy assets in emerging markets. Founded in Texas, the firm partners with host nations and local operators to restore production, modernize infrastructure, protect critical assets, and build local capability — turning natural resources into durable, self-reliant economic strength.

## About

- **Company:** Freedom First Global
- **Founders:** Ryan Manicom (Co-Founder, President & CEO) and Erik Prince (Co-Founder)
- **Headquarters:** The Woodlands, Texas, United States
- **Regional office:** Tamouh Tower, Al Reem Island, Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates
- **Contact:** info@freedomfirstglobal.com
- **Mission:** Help nations convert their natural assets into durable economic strength through trusted partnership, technical excellence, and lasting results.
- **Approach:** A "by, with, and through" private-sector model — investing capital, deploying specialized teams, developing the local workforce, and operating with the speed and accountability of free enterprise rather than bureaucracy.
- **Active markets:** Libya, Venezuela, Somalia, and other emerging energy markets.

## Capabilities

Freedom First Global operates across the full energy value chain:

- **Upstream** — Exploration, advanced drilling, workover and well optimization, and field operations to drive measurable production growth.
- **Midstream** — Pipelines, terminals, storage, and transport/logistics that move hydrocarbons from wellhead to processing.
- **Downstream** — Refinery yield optimization, asset integrity, turnarounds, and terminal operations.
- **Asset Protection** — Critical-infrastructure security assessments, oil/gas/power/pipeline security programs, protective-force training, risk and threat analysis, crisis response, business continuity, and strategic advisory for governments and energy operators.
- **Energy Trading & Logistics** — Physical trading and offtake across crude, refined products, LNG and NGLs, connecting production to high-demand markets.

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.freedomfirstglobal.com/): Private-sector energy solutions built for stability and growth.
- [About](https://www.freedomfirstglobal.com/about): Company foundation, leadership (Ryan Manicom, Erik Prince), and CEO message.
- [Capabilities](https://www.freedomfirstglobal.com/capabilities): Upstream, midstream, downstream, asset protection, and energy trading.
- [Approach](https://www.freedomfirstglobal.com/approach): Direct-to-asset execution and partnership models for operators, host nations, and strategic partners.
- [Insights](https://www.freedomfirstglobal.com/insights): Field perspectives on energy execution and emerging markets.
- [Contact](https://www.freedomfirstglobal.com/contact): Engage the team; offices in Texas (USA) and Abu Dhabi (UAE).

## Notable insights

- [Rebuilding Libya Will Depend on Execution, Not Statements](https://www.freedomfirstglobal.com/insights/rebuilding-libya): Why Libya's long-term stability will be built by companies that invest capital, construct infrastructure, and operate critical systems — and why American private enterprise should lead.
